notes: Active promoted lane: #1060-derived 11L/512d root with coprime multi-shard loading, reserved-time full-Hessian GPTQ6 calibration, and a prune-funded BigramHash 3072x112 upgrade.
purpose: Take the strongest plausibly valid open #1060 family and spend the first follow-up on a single byte-funded capacity delta instead of another eval trick.
prerequisite: Do not spend H100 on an exact donor replay. This lane assumes the local #549/#589 truth run at 1.11956668 is the reference baseline and promotes only the integrated #1060-derived follow-up.
success_criteria: Beat the completed local #589-style reference baseline at 1.11956668 on final sliding_window_exact while staying under the 16,000,000-byte cap and keeping total train-plus-calibration wallclock inside 600 seconds.
